skill.name: fal-platform
skill.description: Platform APIs for model management, pricing, and usage tracking
skill.summary: Access fal.ai platform APIs to manage models, check pricing, and track usage metrics
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: Static analyzer flagged 4 patterns (2 URLs, 2 crypto patterns) at SKILL.md lines 3, 4, 20, 22. All findings are FALSE POSITIVES. The file is documentation-only markdown with YAML frontmatter containing reference URLs and descriptive text. No executable code exists. The URLs are documentation references, not network calls. No cryptographic operations are present. This skill is safe for publication.

content.user_title: Access fal.ai platform APIs for model management
content.value_statement: Developers need to integrate with fal.ai platform for AI model operations. This skill provides structured access to model management, pricing lookup, and usage tracking APIs.
actual_capabilities: Query available models on the fal.ai platform
Retrieve pricing information for different model tiers
Track API usage and consumption metrics
Access platform documentation and API references
Integrate model management into AI workflows
limitations: Requires valid fal.ai platform credentials for API access
Limited to publicly available platform endpoints
Does not handle authentication or API key management
Platform API changes may require skill updates

use_cases.title: Model Selection for AI Projects
use_cases.description: Compare available models and their pricing to select the right option for your project requirements.

use_cases.title: Usage Monitoring and Budget Tracking
use_cases.description: Track API consumption to monitor costs and stay within budget constraints.

use_cases.title: Integration Documentation Reference
use_cases.description: Access platform API documentation for implementing custom integrations.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Model Query
prompt_templates.prompt: List the available models on fal.ai platform with their basic specifications.

prompt_templates.title: Pricing Lookup
prompt_templates.prompt: What are the pricing tiers for inference models on fal.ai? Compare costs for different usage levels.

prompt_templates.title: Usage Analysis
prompt_templates.prompt: Help me understand my API usage patterns. Show me how to track and analyze consumption metrics.

prompt_templates.title: Integration Planning
prompt_templates.prompt: I need to integrate fal.ai APIs into my application. Outline the required endpoints, authentication flow, and best practices for production deployment.

output_examples.output: Returns a structured list of image generation models with model IDs, supported resolutions, pricing per inference, and latency characteristics
Provides aggregated usage statistics including total API calls, tokens consumed, cost breakdown by model category, and remaining quota

best_practices: Always validate API responses before processing the data
Implement caching for frequently accessed pricing and model information
Monitor rate limits and implement exponential backoff for retries
anti_patterns: Do not hardcode API keys or credentials in your code
Avoid making API calls in tight loops without rate limiting
Do not assume API response formats remain stable across versions

faq.question: What is the fal.ai platform?
faq.answer: fal.ai is a serverless platform for running AI models, offering APIs for image generation, video processing, and other ML inference tasks.

faq.question: Do I need a fal.ai account to use this skill?
faq.answer: Yes, you need a fal.ai account and API credentials to access most platform endpoints. Some public model listings may be accessible without authentication.

faq.question: How is pricing calculated on fal.ai?
faq.answer: Pricing is typically based on compute time, model complexity, and output size. Check the pricing endpoint for current rates per model.

faq.question: Can I track my usage in real-time?
faq.answer: The platform provides usage tracking endpoints that return near real-time consumption data, though there may be a small delay in reporting.

faq.question: What happens if I exceed my usage limits?
faq.answer: Exceeding limits may result in throttled requests or additional charges depending on your account tier. Monitor usage regularly to avoid surprises.

faq.question: Is this skill compatible with all Claude Code versions?
faq.answer: Yes, this skill works with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code. No special configuration is required beyond standard API access.
